title: Symphony UI upgrades: Kanban columns rework/human_review/merging + Artifacts + Retry badges
description:
Integrate the Symphony-inspired state machine and proof-of-work artifacts into the dashboard Kanban UI.

## Background
The pipeline now supports new Symphony-style states (rework, human_review, merging) and proof-of-work artifacts (pr_link, test_results, complexity_analysis, video_walkthrough). The dashboard Kanban UI must reflect these changes so humans can manage work at a higher level without supervising individual agent sessions.

## Scope

### 1. Kanban Board Columns
Add three new columns to the Kanban board:
- rework (🟠 Orange) – task returned from review with changes requested
- human_review (🔵 Blue) – explicit handoff state waiting for human approval
- merging (🟣 Purple) – PR approved, automated merge in progress

Column order:
backlog → ready → in_progress → review → rework → human_review → merging → testing → done

### 2. Task Detail Panel Extensions
Add new collapsible sections to the task detail slide-over/card:

**Proof of Work Artifacts**
Render task.artifacts[] with type-specific UI:
- pr_link: clickable link icon + URL
- test_results: badge with pass/fail/skip counts
- complexity_analysis: lines changed, files touched, risk score
- video_walkthrough: embedded or external link
- code_change: file path + description

**Retry Status Badge**
If task.retry.attempt > 0, show warning badge:
"Retry {attempt}/{max_attempts} · Next: {time}"

**Parent / Child Task Links**
- If task.parent_task: show "↳ Sub-task of {parent}" with link
- Query and show auto-created child tasks (tasks with parent_task = this.task_id)

**Workflow Stage Badge**
Show task.workflow_stage as a secondary badge next to status

### 3. API Endpoint Updates

GET /api/control/tasks
- Include retry, artifacts, parent_task in response payload
- Support ?workflow_stage= filter query param

PATCH /api/control/tasks
- Accept artifacts append operation (push to array, don't replace)
- Accept retry reset (when human manually retries a failed task)
- Validate status against extended enum including rework, human_review, merging

GET /api/control/health
- Add running_sessions_count vs max_concurrent per agent
- Add retry_queue_depth (count of tasks with next_retry_at in the future)

### 4. Agent Health Page (/agents) Extensions

Queue & Blockers Panel:
- Show rework tasks in engineer queue
- Show human_review tasks as "Waiting for human"
- Color-code by state

New Metrics:
- proof_of_work_coverage: % of done tasks that have artifacts
- retry_rate: % of tasks that required at least one retry
- auto_created_tasks: count of tasks where parent_task is not null

## Technical Details

Files to modify (rook-dashboard repo):
- src/lib/control/tasks.ts – extend Task model type
- src/app/api/control/tasks/route.ts – GET/PATCH handlers
- src/app/kanban/page.tsx – add columns, color coding
- src/app/kanban/TaskDetail.tsx – new sections
- src/app/agents/page.tsx – Queue & Blockers extensions
- src/lib/control/health.ts – new health snapshot fields

Schema reference:
- operations/schemas/task-v1.1.json (in rook-workspace repo)
- docs/SYMPHONY-UPGRADE.md for full specification

## Definition of Done
- [ ] All three new Kanban columns render correctly with color coding
- [ ] Task detail shows artifacts section when present
- [ ] Retry badge renders with correct attempt count and next retry time
- [ ] Parent/child links are clickable and navigate to correct task
- [ ] API endpoints handle new fields without breaking existing tasks
- [ ] Agent health page shows new metrics and queue state
- [ ] All existing Kanban functionality still works (regression test)
- [ ] Changes committed and pushed to branch

checklist.title: Add rework, human_review, merging columns to Kanban
Implement Proof of Work artifacts section in TaskDetail
Add retry status badge to task cards/detail
Add parent/child task links in task detail
Update API endpoints for new task fields
Extend agent health page with new metrics
